title: Slicer chip
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''slicer chip''' was similar to the [[electronic lock breaker]] in that it was designed to hack into security systems. The slicer chip could be used to break into computers, [[Droid/Legends|droids]], and other automated devices. Some were even capable of controlling entire vehicles, navigation systems, security systems or overriding a droid's programming.

==Appearances==
*''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}}
